description: Circular letter, written in the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan, addressed to an unnamed community. After the opening salutations in Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic, and praises for the righteousness of the addressees, they are admonished to contribute toward the upkeep of the synagogue at Dammūh. Reused on verso for a midrashic discussion in a different hand with many citations such as Psalms 106:2 and 145:4 and Job 5:9, and with quotations from BT Horayot 13b. (Information in part from CUDL and Goitein's index card.) Join: Alan Elbaum
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
